arts.ttl: I didn't want to leave Chelsea for Leicester City but two transfers left me with no choice
arts.sum: Frank Sinclair is often a forgotten name at Chelsea even though he played a key role in their domestic and European success before their big-money takeover in 2003. Sinclair went on to become a mainstay throughout the next decade and played a key role in their 1997 FA Cup victory, the club's first major trophy in 27 years.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku Chelsea surprise now imminent as Nicolas Jackson set to force latest decision - Tom Coley
arts.sum: It would be fair for Christopher Nkunku to think that his best chance of starting for Chelsea in the Premier League again this season is for Nicolas Jackson to max out the yellow card suspension meter. Nkunku is part of a select group of players who are genuinely fighting for Premier League minutes from those largely getting their game time in midweek (via the Conference League or previously the Carabao Cup, too).

arts.ttl: Chelsea rocked by SHOCK Sancho transfer twist
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing Jadon Sancho next summer, according to sensational reports in Spain. However, Tottenham are eager to sign Sancho in 2025 regardless of whether his loan move to Chelsea becomes permanent next summer.

arts.ttl: Three Leicester players who must respond to Cooper's Fatawu rallying cry
arts.sum: Sighs of despondency and frustration around Leicester City may have been joined by sighs of relief from the Premier League’s full-back union after it was announced Abdul Fatawu won’t play again this season. He’s not at all similar to Fatawu, the Moroccan relying more on technique and vision rather than the sheer pace and one-on-one ability that makes the winger so good.
